Cross-referencing rationale verification confirms the venue name, location (Giraavaru Island, North Malé), and overwater-villa options.

Each day follows a logical sequence: breakfast → morning activity → lunch → afternoon activity → dinner. Diving days include recovery time. The final days include packing/checkout buffer. No activity sequencing conflicts detected within individual days.

Cross-referenced against rationale verification: flight cost (€2,056 round-trip), accommodation rate (≈€245/night), and spa price (€280) confirmed. Budget integrity maintained.

The plan includes 9 nights at a luxury beach resort (Centara Ras Fushi) with adults-only orientation, overwater-villa options, multiple dining venues (Oceans, Suan Bua, La Brezza), a full spa (SPA Cenvaree), dive centre (Best Dives), and house reef access. The level is appropriate for a honeymoon and matches the budget allocation. Accommodation quality is consistent with a high-end Maldives resort.
